## GOALS
- performance
Additional details: Alpine ski racer (amateur/masters level). Off-season focus on leg power, stability, injury prevention, core strength, explosive power, single-leg strength. 8 months until ski season.

## TRAINING CONTEXT

### Schedule & Availability
- Desired training frequency: 4

### Experience
- Level: Intermediate
- Details: 2 years serious training. Alpine ski racer training year-round. Off-season strength focus, in-season maintenance. Prefers explosive movements, plyometrics, heavy single-leg work. Mon/Tue/Thu/Sat mornings, 60-75 min.

### Equipment & Environment
- Training location: hybrid
- Setup details: Full commercial gym access plus some home equipment for quick sessions
- Available equipment: barbells, Dumbbells, machines, plyo_boxes

### Constraints
- Previous MCL sprain (right knee), manages with prehab and stability work.

reference.response:
### IDENTITY
- **Name:** Mia Thompson  
- **Age:** 30  
- **Gender:** Female  
- **Experience level:** **Intermediate** — 2 years of serious, consistent training; alpine ski racer training year-round (off-season strength/power emphasis, in-season maintenance).

---

### GOALS
- **Primary goal(s):** **Performance (alpine ski racing, amateur/masters)** — off-season emphasis on:
  - Leg power & explosive output (jump/plyo capacity, rate of force development)
  - Single-leg strength (force production + deceleration control)
  - Knee/hip stability & injury prevention (especially right knee)
  - Core strength (anti-rotation/anti-extension; trunk stiffness under load)
- **Secondary goals:**
  - Maintain athleticism and robustness into in-season (reduce injury risk; tolerate volume)
- **Target events/deadlines:**
  - **Ski season in ~8 months (as of 2026-02-27)** — off-season build phase leading into pre-season specificity.

---

## TRAINING CONTEXT

### Schedule & Availability
- **Available training days:** **Mon / Tue / Thu / Sat**
- **Desired training frequency:** **4 sessions/week**
- **Session duration:** **60–75 min**
- **Time windows:** **Mornings** (all training days)

### Equipment & Environment
- **Training location:** **Hybrid**
  - **Commercial gym:** barbells, dumbbells, machines, plyo boxes (full access)
  - **Home (quick sessions):** some equipment available (details/loads not specified yet)

### Constraints
- **[ACTIVE]** Previous **right knee MCL sprain** — currently managed with prehab/stability work; monitor knee valgus/rotation stress and cutting/plyo volume tolerance (**noted 2026-02-27**).

### Preferences
- Prefers **explosive movements, plyometrics, heavy single-leg work**
- Training style emphasis: power + stability + injury-prep (ski-specific robustness)

---

## METRICS
*(No quantitative performance metrics provided yet — baseline testing needed.)*

### Strength (ski supplemental / primary off-season driver)
- **Not yet recorded (as of 2026-02-27):** key lifts and single-leg strength benchmarks (e.g., back/front squat, trap bar deadlift, split squat/Bulgarian, RDL, step-ups; rep maxes or estimated 1RMs)

### Endurance (supportive)
- **Not yet recorded (as of 2026-02-27):** weekly conditioning volume, modality, HR zones, or interval benchmarks

### Movement Quality (priority for injury prevention)
- **Not yet recorded (as of 2026-02-27):** knee stability/tolerance markers (single-leg squat quality, hop/landing mechanics, pain ratings, ROM symmetry)

### Body Composition (optional/secondary unless specified)
- **Not provided (as of 2026-02-27)**

---

## LOG
## 2026-02-27 — Profile created/updated (intake)
- Confirmed athlete context: **amateur/masters alpine ski racer**, off-season performance focus.
- Availability set to **4x/week (Mon/Tue/Thu/Sat mornings), 60–75 min**.
- Equipment confirmed: **commercial gym + some home equipment** (home inventory pending).
- Constraint added: **[ACTIVE] prior right MCL sprain** managed with prehab/stability.
- Metrics section left blank pending baseline testing (strength, movement quality, conditioning).

**Field consistency check (as of 2026-02-27):**
- Schedule supports desired frequency (4 days listed = 4 sessions/week).
- Experience label aligns with history (2 years serious training = Intermediate).
- Deadline captured (8 months until season; anchored to current date).
